channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Opinion: Apple’s translating AirPods won’t work without state’s language grads
item.description: Higher education must not retreat from language instruction under the illusion that “the machines can do it.
item.dc:creator: Annie K. Lamar, The Mercury News

item.title: Getting real about AI strategy and deployment
item.description: Federal experts share real-world lessons on deploying AI across aging infrastructure, slow funding cycles, and workforce gaps. The post Getting real about AI strategy and deployment first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Tesla’s ‘Robotaxi’ service is no Waymo
item.description: Greetings, salutations, and my thanks—as always—for reading Fast Company’s Plugged In. Me: “Are you here just to monitor for safety?” Guy sitting in the driver’s seat of the Tesla Model Y I’m riding in: “I can’t specify.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Lyft plans fleet of hundreds of Tensor Robocars from 2027
item.description: Lyft Inc. is partnering with autonomous vehicle developer Tensor Auto Inc. to deploy a fleet of hundreds of robotaxis in Europe and North America starting in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple to move health, fitness divisions to services in reorganization
item.description: Apple Inc. is preparing to expand the roles of some top executives in response to the pending departure of longtime Chief Operating Officer Jeff Williams, according to people familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: YouTube is letting some previously banned users return. That means you may see videos that violated old rules
item.description: YouTube on Thursday will begin offering previously banned users the opportunity to create new accounts and potentially re-publish some videos that may have contributed to their termination but no longer violate YouTube's rules.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: How to watch WWE Crown Jewel 2025: live stream Cody Rhodes vs Seth Rollins & more
item.description: The WWE Crown Jewel 2025 live stream from Australia sees a star-packed card featuring Cody Rhodes, Seth Rollins, John Cena and Roman Reigns – here's how to watch.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Battlefield 6 release time - here's when you'll be able to preload and play Battlefield 6 in your timezone
item.description: Here's the Battlefield 6 release time for your timezone. This includes information on preloading, and details on exactly when you can jump into the game.
item.dc:creator: Jake Green, TechRadar

item.title: Google researchers say Oracle EBR hackers have hit dozens of organizations
item.description: The attacks started a lot earlier than previously thought, and bear the hallmarks of multiple threat actors.
item.dc:creator: Sead Fadilpašić, TechRadar

item.title: UK watchdog targets Google's 'strategic' role in search ads and a competitive market
item.description: Britain’s antitrust watchdog is labeling Google a “strategic” player in the online search advertising market, paving the way for regulators to force the company to change its business practices to ensure more competition in that market.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to watch South Korea vs Brazil for *FREE*
item.description: Here's our quick guide on how to watch South Korea vs Brazil with both teams already qualified for the 2026 World Cup.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: AI first: The EU’s new AI strategy
item.description:
EU Commission President von der Leyen called for an AI-first mindset at the presentation of the Apply AI and AI in Science Strategy.
miss.cabul – Shutterstock.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OpenAI Codex adds SDK, admin tools, Slack integration
item.description: Codex, OpenAI’s AI-powered software engineering agent that can work on tasks in parallel, is now generally available. Since being launched as a research preview in May, Codex has added Slack integration, an SDK, and admin tools. OpenAI announced general availability of Codex on October 6.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Saying 'I do' to AI? Ohio lawmaker proposes ban on marriage, legal personhood for AI
item.description: “As the computer systems improve in their capacity to act more like humans, we want to be sure we have prohibitions in our law that prohibit those systems from ever being human in their agency.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, NewsNation

item.title: Intel reveals XeSS 3 with Multi-Frame Generation - and unlike Nvidia's MFG, it works on older GPUs
item.description: Taking a page from Nvidia's playbook, and doing things better to boot - now AMD is the only GPU maker not to have MFG on the menu.
item.dc:creator: Darren Allan, TechRadar

item.title: Sora 2 just ran into Hollywood’s legal wall – talent agents are calling for control over AI-generated stars
item.description: Sora 2 has provoked Hollywood’s most powerful talent agencies to draw a hard line against the AI video-maker
item.dc:creator: Eric Hal Schwartz, TechRadar

item.title: Ray-Ban maker Essilor touts Meta glasses as next smartphone blockbuster
item.description: The world's biggest eyewear maker is positioning itself as a leader in the emerging category of smart glasses, a device that could become as prevalent as an iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Army’s NGC2 must be tested in realistic, contested environments
item.description: "What we don't want to do is have a demonstration that goes out there and shows success without proving it in a true environment," Anthony Nigara said. The post Army’s NGC2 must be tested in realistic, contested environments first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Leveraging AI-powered defense to secure the NOC at Black Hat USA
item.description: The Black Hat USA Network Operations Center (NOC) is a unique environment, serving as a real-time proving ground for cybersecurity technologies tested by some of the world’s most talented cyber professionals.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Salesforce brings agentic AI to IT service management
item.description: Salesforce is bringing agentic AI to IT service management (ITSM). The CRM giant is taking aim at competitors like ServiceNow with Agentforce IT Service, a new IT support suite that leverages autonomous agents to resolve incidents and service requests.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Princess of Wales suggests parents should put down the phone to combat social discontent
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The Princess of Wales has a suggestion for parents: Please put down the phone. Kate, as she is commonly known, collaborated with adult development researcher Robert Waldinger to warn that technology is contributing to an epidemic of disconnection that is hurting family relationships.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gemini Enterprise is Google’s new ‘front door’ for agentic AI access at work
item.description: Google has introduced a new AI assistant to serve as a platform so users can access and coordinate agents that automate work tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Splunk’s Bart Larango on why mission success hinges on a unified data strategy
item.description: Without a unified data strategy, agencies struggle to act fast, says the federal Splunk advisor. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Splunk’s Bart Larango on why mission success hinges on a unified data strategy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Greenland's leader hails EU as trusted friend and urges investment in its minerals
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Greenland’s leader on Wednesday thanked the European Union for being “a trusted friend” and urged the 27-nation bloc to invest in his country’s mineral resources, renewable energy, airports and internet services.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Studio Ghibli: It’s good for your health, a new study shows
item.description: As any Studio Ghibli fan will testify, an afternoon spent binging Hayao Miyazaki classics is guaranteed to leave a warm, fuzzy feeling inside. Now we know this feeling is backed by science.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Oracle Java Management Service adds application analyzer
item.description: Oracle Java Management Service (JMS), an Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) service for managing the use of Java in the enterprise, has added an Analyze Applications capability, for gaining quick, actional insights on Java applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: She helped North Korea infiltrate American tech companies
item.description: From her Arizona living room, Christina Chapman ran a covert hub that helped North Korean operatives infiltrate U.S. firms, netting $17 million in stolen salaries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USPTO to use AI tool for automated search pilot
item.description: The USPTO continues to invest heavily in AI capabilities; a new pilot program is designed to assess patent applications for potential "prior art" issues. The post USPTO to use AI tool for automated search pilot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Tesla offers cheaper versions of 2 electric vehicles in bid to win back market share in tough year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tesla rolled out new, cheaper versions of two of its electric car models on Tuesday in hopes the offerings will help revive flagging sales but investors dumped its stock anyway.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, The Hill

item.title: Nearly 100M jobs could be lost to AI, automation, Sanders warns
item.description: Here's which jobs are most at risk of being replaced by AI and automation, according to a new Senate report.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: IBM integrates Anthropic Claude into AI IDE and other tools
item.description: IBM and Anthropic have partnered in an effort to accelerate the development of enterprise AI applications, by integrating Anthropic’s Claude large language models (LLMs) into IBM software products, beginning with IBM’s new AI-leveraging IDE (integrated development environment).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The best new features and fixes in Python 3.14
item.description: Python 3.14 is now generally available. This article presents a rundown of the most significant new features in the next version of Python and what they mean for Python developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Are genAI-fueled layoffs ever legit? Oracle may have found a way
item.description: Oracle is not the first company you think of when it comes to disciplined spending and cash management. But in recent months, Oracle has surprised some people.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AMD: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: Intel news and insights | Nvidia news and insights AMD continues to make gains in processor and data center markets thanks largely to its EPYC processors, which has chipped away at Intel’s long-standing dominance.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Deloitte to partially refund Australian government for report with apparent AI-generated errors
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Deloitte Australia will partially refund the 440,000 Australian dollars ($290,000) paid by the Australian government for a report that was littered with apparent AI-generated errors, including a fabricated quote from a federal court judgment and references to nonexistent
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OpenAI and chipmaker AMD sign chip supply partnership for AI infrastructure
item.description: Semiconductor maker AMD will supply its chips to artificial intelligence company OpenAI as part of an agreement to team up on building AI infrastructure, the companies said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
